title: About Imlayloo
intro1: I’m Layloo (Leïla for close friends), a passionate streamer and flight attendant.
intro2: Between flights, I go live to share gaming and IRL moments with you.
intro3: On the menu: multigaming, spontaneous chats, discoveries, and sometimes IRL streams.
intro4: Make yourself comfortable, enjoy, and maybe this place will become yours too ✨
